title: Eric Ries Joins Unshackled Ventures as 'Incorruptible' Partner
summary: In one of the first public signals of the book's themes entering the venture world, Ries joins Unshackled Ventures in a new role explicitly named after the book. The partnership is built around a shared conviction that founders who care about both purpose and performance deserve support from day zero. Ries's research for the book found that companies anchored in deep, durable missions are six times more likely to survive — a finding that reframes mission-driven leadership from idealism to competitive advantage.
blockquote: Companies like Cloudflare, Devoted Health, Costco, Patagonia, GitLab...have created deeply loyal customers, truly happy employees...And they outperformed their competition.
